languages.text: Эоганн утверждает, что генетор Ферренц отказывается чинить Нунциуса. Он ждет Вольного Торговца на мостике, чтобы призвать Ферренца к ответу.
Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.
languages.original_text: Эоганн утверждает, что генетор Ферренц отказывается чинить Нунциуса. Он ждет Вольного Торговца на мостике, чтобы призвать Ферренца к ответу.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.
Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.
Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

languages.text: Eogunn afirma que el genetor Ferrenz se niega a reparar a Nuncius. Espera en el puente a que su Comerciante Independiente reprenda a Ferrenz.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn afirma que el genetor Ferrenz se niega a reparar a Nuncius. Espera en el puente a que su Comerciante Independiente reprenda a Ferrenz.

languages.text: 伊奥贡声称，基因士费伦茨拒绝修复努恩修斯。此刻，他正等在舰桥上，指望行商浪人能就此事向费伦茨兴师问罪。
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡声称，基因士费伦茨拒绝修复努恩修斯。此刻，他正等在舰桥上，指望行商浪人能就此事向费伦茨兴师问罪。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz refuse de réparer Nuncius. Eogunn attend sur la passerelle que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} vienne lui faire les remontrances qui s'imposent.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz refuse de réparer Nuncius. Eogunn attend sur la passerelle que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} vienne lui faire les remontrances qui s'imposent.

languages.text: Eogunn, Genetör Ferrenz'in Nuncius'u onarmayı reddettiğini iddia ediyor. Hür Tacir'in bu mesele yüzünden Ferrenz'i paylaması için onu köprüde bekliyor.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, Genetör Ferrenz'in Nuncius'u onarmayı reddettiğini iddia ediyor. Hür Tacir'in bu mesele yüzünden Ferrenz'i paylaması için onu köprüde bekliyor.

languages.text: Laut Eogunn weigert sich Genetor Ferrenz, Nuncius zu reparieren. Er erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} auf der Brücke, um Ferrenz eine Lektion zu erteilen.
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.

traits.locale_text: Laut Eogunn weigert sich Genetor Ferrenz, Nuncius zu reparieren. Er erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} auf der Brücke, um Ferrenz eine Lektion zu erteilen.

languages.text: Eogunnは、Genetor FerrenzがNunciusの修理を拒否していると主張している。彼はブリッジで、ローグ・トレーダーがフェレンツにこの問題を問いただすのを待っている。
languages.original_text: Eogunn claims that Genetor Ferrenz is refusing to repair Nuncius. He is waiting on the bridge for the Rogue Trader to take Ferrenz to task over the matter.
